title: The importance of smell in Rebuild
display_title: The importance of smell in Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: The importance of smell in Rebuild             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Sun Feb 20, 2011 2:08 pm Well, this isn't a question so much as something I've noticed. There seems to be a lot of references to "smell" in Rebuild, much more so than the original NGE. Here's a list of times I've noticed the characters talking about smell (not necessarily in chronological order): -Shinji talking about LCL smelling like blood (I'm not sure whether this was in Rebuild or in NGE) -Rei saying how Eva-01 smells like Shinji during the Eva-switch experiment thing (in NGE, not Rebuild) -Mari telling Shinji how he smells like LCL -Mari saying how Evas that smell of other people aren't that bad -Shinji saying how his hands smell like earth/soil -Shinji saying how his Eva smells like his mother, then how it smells like Ayanami I think that's it, if there are any more, just say so. Has anybody else noticed this, or am I looking too much into it? I want to say that this means something/alludes to something important, but I can't quite put my finger on what that "something important" is.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Feb 20, 2011 2:10 pm Anno has fetish for body odors

Article: The importance of smell in Rebuild
[]: The importance of smell in Rebuild             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Sun Feb 20, 2011 2:08 pm Well, this isn't a question so much as something I've noticed. There seems to be a lot of references to "smell" in Rebuild, much more so than the original NGE. Here's a list of times I've noticed the characters talking about smell (not necessarily in chronological order): -Shinji talking about LCL smelling like blood (I'm not sure whether this was in Rebuild or in NGE) -Rei saying how Eva-01 smells like Shinji during the Eva-switch experiment thing (in NGE, not Rebuild) -Mari telling Shinji how he smells like LCL -Mari saying how Evas that smell of other people aren't that bad -Shinji saying how his hands smell like earth/soil -Shinji saying how his Eva smells like his mother, then how it smells like Ayanami I think that's it, if there are any more, just say so. Has anybody else noticed this, or am I looking too much into it? I want to say that this means something/alludes to something important, but I can't quite put my finger on what that "something important" is.
